data.content: Restored the dispatch pool row to the original fixed-width flex layout, kept AgentDisplayLabel's default inline behavior, and added a pool-row-only stacked layout so agent pills render beneath the name without overlapping the weight summary. Validation: bun run lint (passes with one pre-existing react-hooks/incompatible-library warning in src/components/beat-form.tsx:368), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build.
